name: hookforge
description: Production-grade webhook delivery and retry platform built with Node.js.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @hookforge/shared && npm run build -w @hookforge/db && npm run build -w @hookforge/api && npm run build -w @hookforge/worker
scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w @hookforge/shared && npm run build -w @hookforge/db && npm run dev -w @hookforge/api
scripts.dev:worker: npm run build -w @hookforge/shared && npm run build -w @hookforge/db && npm run dev -w @hookforge/worker
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @hookforge/shared && npm run build -w @hookforge/db && npm run typecheck -w @hookforge/api && npm run typecheck -w @hookforge/worker
